description: Nick from the Solana Foundation Devrel team explains how to use the metadata token extension on the SPL token extension program. He initializes a project, installs dependencies, and demonstrates creating a new mint with metadata on the Solana blockchain.
topic_summary: Overview of using the metadata token extension on Solana's SPL token program, including project setup, dependency installation, and mint creation with metadata [t=0:24 - t=374:17].
